_comment: Tiny precomputed embedding fixtures for the pgvector / NumPy-cosine demo in 30-03. Real embeddings are ~1536-dim; these are 8-dim toy vectors chosen so the cosine ranking is stable and obvious. They are NOT from a real model — they exist only to make the top-k similarity query runnable offline.
